Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

SOS Roofing Co was a lifesaver! We had a major leak after a thunderstorm, and they came out within hours to tarp the roof and prevent further damage. The repair was done quickly and professionally. Highly recommend!

D
David S.

After getting several quotes, we chose SOS Roofing Co for our roof replacement. Their price was competitive, but more importantly, they were knowledgeable and trustworthy. The crew was efficient and cleaned up thoroughly. Our new roof looks fantastic!

J
Jessica L.

We hired SOS Roofing Co for a pre-purchase roof inspection on a home we were considering buying. The inspector was very thorough and identified some potential issues that we were able to address with the seller. Worth every penny!

R
Robert K.

I've used SOS Roofing Co for gutter cleaning for the past few years, and they always do a great job. They're reliable, affordable, and leave my property clean. It's a relief knowing my gutters are clear and protecting my home from water damage.

Additional Roofing Contractor Services

Roof Replacement Roof Repair Roof Inspection Gutter Services

SOS Roofing Co — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every roofing contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The SOS Roofing Co Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific roofing contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Tampa & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Tampa, FL and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

St. Petersburg Clearwater Brandon Wesley Chapel Tampa Riverview Lutz Land O' Lakes
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofing contractor services.

How long does a roof replacement typically take?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of your roof, but most residential replacements take 3-5 days.

Do I need to be home during the roof replacement process?

While not required, being available to answer questions can be helpful. We'll keep you informed throughout the project.

What types of roofing materials do you offer?

We offer a wide range of materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and flat roofing options to suit your style and budget.

Built on Tampa Values

Protect your home with a strong, reliable roof. Contact us today for a free, no-obligation inspection and estimate.

Let's Begin →
